nasb.text: Thus says the Lord God to these bones, ‘Behold, I will cause breath to enter you that you may come to life.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord God to these bones: Behold, I will cause breath to enter you, and you shall live.

cnv.text: 主耶和華對這些骸骨這樣說：看哪！我必使氣息進入你們裡面，你們就活過來了。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说，我要使气息进入你们里面，你们就必复活过来。
